name: Spam Carbonera
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick skillet, combine the onion, fennel seeds, and 3/4 cup chicken broth. Bring to a boil; continue boiling, stirring occasionally, until liquid has evaporated.
2. Add the SPAM strips and remaining 3/4 cup broth. Return to a boil.
3. Stir in the parsley.
4. In a bowl, beat together the egg whites and egg.
5. Cook the vermicelli according to package directions; drain well.
6. Stir the hot pasta into the SPAM mixture.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the pasta and lift with 2 forks to mix thoroughly.
8. Sprinkle with 1 cup Parmesan cheese. Mix until all broth is absorbed.
9. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
